sourceName: Rajya Sabha / Union Law Ministry figures reported by The Times of India
notes: Imported as an interim Supreme Court-wide pendency snapshot.
The source reports Union Law Minister / Rajya Sabha figures and states that the Supreme Court had 90,694 pending cases as of 2025-12-01.
Civil/criminal split, monthly institution, monthly disposal, and coram-wise pendency were not available from this source and are intentionally omitted rather than estimated.
Replace with official Supreme Court of India or NJDG structured data when available.
